title: Mouth Numbing Smoke Hot Venezuelan Meat Empanadas
description: Earthy and crumbly empanadas filled with smoke hot meat, featuring english mustard, perfect for those who love nostalgic venezuelan dishes, this recipe is gluten free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, cook the ground beef over medium high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the english mustard, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the gluten free flour and salt.
Gradually add the water to the bowl, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll each ball out into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture onto the center of each circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
